references.title: Central Bank Data Governance Framework v3.2
references.description: Defines mandatory data retention periods and audit trail requirements for financial institutions. Referenced in CON-001.

references.title: IT Architecture Decision Record ADR-2024-017
references.location: Confluence — IT Architecture / Decision Records / ADR-2024-017
references.description: Records the decision to maintain core ledger platform at v14.2 and the API integration approach. Referenced in CON-002.

references.title: Settlement Reconciliation Process Audit Report FY2025
references.description: Internal audit finding that identified the 5-day average reconciliation cycle time and manual matching inefficiencies. Source for problem statement and KPI baseline.

references.title: Core Ledger API Specification v2.1
references.description: Technical specification for the event streaming API to be consumed by the reconciliation engine.
